title: 國小版-困難版-混合版-過去式規則與不規則-2026-06-12

questions.prompt: After the bell rang yesterday, the students ____ to the classroom quickly.
questions.explanation: yesterday 表示過去，go 的不規則過去式是 went。

questions.prompt: Mia ____ her notebook before the quiz started.
questions.explanation: started 是過去式，前面的動作也在過去，check 的規則過去式是 checked。

questions.prompt: Did your brother ____ breakfast before school this morning?
questions.explanation: Did 已經表示過去，後面的主要動詞要用原形 eat。

questions.prompt: They ____ the classroom after the club meeting last Friday.
questions.explanation: last Friday 是過去時間，clean 的規則過去式是 cleaned。

questions.prompt: Kevin did not ____ his umbrella home yesterday.
questions.explanation: did not 後面要接原形 take，不用 took。

questions.prompt: My sister ____ a long letter to her friend last night.
questions.explanation: last night 是過去時間，write 的不規則過去式是 wrote。

questions.prompt: The boys ____ soccer until it got dark yesterday.
questions.explanation: yesterday 是過去時間，play 的規則過去式是 played。

questions.prompt: ____ Amy see the rainbow after the rain stopped?
questions.explanation: stopped 是過去式，過去式疑問句要用 Did。

questions.prompt: Dad ____ the old chair after lunch yesterday.
questions.explanation: yesterday 表示過去，fix 的規則過去式是 fixed。

questions.prompt: The dog ____ under the table when the thunder started.
questions.explanation: started 是過去時間線索，hide 的不規則過去式是 hid。

questions.prompt: We did not ____ the movie because we had too much homework.
questions.explanation: did not 後面接原形 watch，不能用 watched。

questions.prompt: Lisa ____ her lunch before the game began.
questions.explanation: began 是過去式，eat 的不規則過去式是 ate。

questions.prompt: Did the students ____ their hands before lunch yesterday?
questions.explanation: Did 開頭的過去式疑問句中，主要動詞用原形 wash。

questions.prompt: Tom ____ his math homework after dinner last night.
questions.explanation: last night 是過去時間，do 的不規則過去式是 did。

questions.prompt: The children ____ loudly when the teacher asked a funny question.
questions.explanation: asked 是過去式，laugh 的規則過去式是 laughed。

questions.prompt: I did not ____ the answer, so I asked my teacher.
questions.explanation: did not 後面接原形 know，不用 knew。

questions.prompt: The class ____ the new song twice yesterday.
questions.explanation: yesterday 是過去時間，sing 的不規則過去式是 sang。

questions.prompt: Nina ____ her schoolbag before she went to bed.
questions.explanation: went to bed 是過去情境，pack 的規則過去式是 packed。

questions.prompt: ____ Jack bring his dictionary to class yesterday?
questions.explanation: yesterday 是過去時間，疑問句要用 Did。

questions.prompt: Mom ____ a cake for my birthday last weekend.
questions.explanation: last weekend 是過去時間，make 的不規則過去式是 made。

questions.prompt: The team did not ____ hard after the rain started.
questions.explanation: did not 後面要接原形 practice。

questions.prompt: Grandma ____ us an old story before bedtime.
questions.explanation: before bedtime 在這裡是過去事件，tell 的不規則過去式是 told。

questions.prompt: We ____ at the bus stop for twenty minutes yesterday morning.
questions.explanation: yesterday morning 是過去時間，wait 的規則過去式是 waited。

questions.prompt: Did Lily ____ the book back to the library last Monday?
questions.explanation: Did 開頭的過去式疑問句中，主要動詞要用原形 return。

questions.prompt: The boys ____ in the pool after school yesterday.
questions.explanation: yesterday 是過去時間，swim 的不規則過去式是 swam。

questions.prompt: Amy ____ the flowers before she left home.
questions.explanation: left home 是過去情境，water 的規則過去式是 watered。

questions.prompt: I did not ____ my pencil case this morning.
questions.explanation: did not 後面接原形 find，不用 found。

questions.prompt: Ben ____ the ball over the fence during the game.
questions.explanation: during the game 指過去事件，throw 的不規則過去式是 threw。

questions.prompt: The girl ____ the door quietly last night.
questions.explanation: last night 是過去時間，close 的規則過去式是 closed。

questions.prompt: ____ your dad drive you to school yesterday?
questions.explanation: yesterday 是過去時間，疑問句用 Did；後面的 drive 用原形。

questions.prompt: The students ____ the answer after the teacher explained it.
questions.explanation: explained 是過去式，understand 的不規則過去式是 understood。

questions.prompt: We did not ____ the classroom because the meeting ended late.
questions.explanation: did not 後面要接原形 decorate。

questions.prompt: My brother ____ a new pencil at the store yesterday.
questions.explanation: yesterday 是過去時間，buy 的不規則過去式是 bought。

questions.prompt: The baby ____ when Mom opened the door.
questions.explanation: opened 是過去式，smile 的規則過去式是 smiled。

questions.prompt: Did the children ____ early after the trip?
questions.explanation: Did 開頭時，主要動詞要用原形 sleep。

questions.prompt: The teacher ____ the homework on the board yesterday.
questions.explanation: yesterday 是過去時間，write 的不規則過去式是 wrote。

questions.prompt: They ____ their plan before the game started.
questions.explanation: started 是過去式，change 的規則過去式是 changed。

questions.prompt: I did not ____ the story because the room was too noisy.
questions.explanation: did not 後面接原形 hear，不用 heard。

questions.prompt: Lisa ____ a gift from her aunt last Sunday.
questions.explanation: last Sunday 是過去時間，get 的不規則過去式是 got。

questions.prompt: The class ____ the museum for two hours yesterday afternoon.
questions.explanation: yesterday afternoon 是過去時間，visit 的規則過去式是 visited。

questions.prompt: ____ Tom leave his jacket in the classroom yesterday?
questions.explanation: yesterday 是過去時間，疑問句要用 Did。

questions.prompt: Dad ____ home late because the train was slow.
questions.explanation: was slow 是過去情境，come 的不規則過去式是 came。

questions.prompt: The children did not ____ their toys before dinner.
questions.explanation: did not 後面接原形片語 pick up。

questions.prompt: My cousin ____ a picture of the mountains last weekend.
questions.explanation: last weekend 是過去時間，draw 的不規則過去式是 drew。

questions.prompt: We ____ the heavy boxes into the room yesterday.
questions.explanation: yesterday 是過去時間，carry 的規則過去式是 carried。

questions.prompt: Did your team ____ the game last night?
questions.explanation: Did 已經表示過去，後面的主要動詞用原形 win。

questions.prompt: The little boy ____ down after running too fast.
questions.explanation: after running too fast 指過去事件，fall 的不規則過去式是 fell。

questions.prompt: Emma ____ the answer carefully before she raised her hand.
questions.explanation: raised 是過去式，plan 的規則過去式是 planned。

questions.prompt: They did not ____ any milk at breakfast yesterday.
questions.explanation: did not 後面要接原形 drink。

questions.prompt: The teacher ____ the students' names before the test started.
questions.explanation: started 是過去式，call 的規則過去式是 called。
